agents.title: Agents

empty.title: No matching agents
empty.body: Try a different search or filter.

agents.note: Large lists live in the main area (searchable, filterable by status / team) instead of the narrow rail — so a growing agent roster never crowds the secondary nav.

humans.title: Humans

empty.title: No matching humans
empty.body: Try a different search or filter.

humans.note: A human can belong to multiple teams (unlike an agent, which is exclusive to one) — the TEAMS column shows every team they belong to, and the top bar can filter by team.

empty.title: No teams yet
empty.body: Create your first squad — declare the role mix and team-memory (Phase-1 does not mint agents; they are enrolled at runtime).

roles.title: Edit role definitions
roles.subtitle: Add, configure, or remove roles. Roles assigned to members cannot be removed or renamed.
roles.invalid: Every role needs a unique name.

overview.healthNote: Running / blocked tasks and member presence are live runtime telemetry; Phase-1 has not wired the facade aggregate yet — real values land once it is connected (showing — for now).

members.title: Members
members.exclusivityNote: Exclusivity rule: an agent belongs to exactly one team at a time (adding one already elsewhere → a second migration confirm); a human may join many teams.
members.emptyBody: Click + Add member to enroll an agent / human into a declared role.

projects.title: Linked projects
projects.emptyBody: Once a project is linked, this team's members can be assigned its tasks.
projects.note: Once a project is linked, this team's members can be assigned its tasks; team-memory is visible in the project context.
projects.unlinkMessage: Unlink this project? Members will no longer be assigned its tasks.
projects.pickerSubtitle: Pick one of the org's projects to link to this team; members can then be assigned its tasks.
projects.pickerEmptyBody: Every active project in the org is already linked, or there are none yet.

templates.title: Team Templates
templates.emptyBody: Extract a blueprint from a team, or import a cross-org template JSON.

importModal.title: Import team template
importModal.subtitle: Paste an exported team-template/v1 JSON envelope; importing re-homes it to this org (curated=false).

templateDetail.seedMemoryHint: seeded into the new team's memory-repo on instantiate · curated · read-only preview

overview.note: Instantiate builds a team from this mix, declares the role slots, seeds the Seed Memory into the new team's memory-repo, and binds the workflow-ref. Phase-1 does not mint agent identities (enrolled at runtime), is project-independent, and project linkage comes later. {{slots}} slots total.

curation.title: Curation & source
curation.hint: per-token disposition at extract time (audit read-only)
curation.note: This template was extracted from {{source}}. The suspected proprietary tokens below were curated one by one: placeholder = replaced with a placeholder, kept = kept after human confirmation.

instances.title: Instances
instances.emptyBody: No team has been instantiated from this template yet.

newTeamModal.title: New Team
newTeamModal.subtitle: Declare the role mix — configure CLI / model / tags / concurrency per role. Creating declares the role slots and a memory-repo (Phase-1 does not mint agent identities; they are enrolled at runtime).
newTeamModal.footerHint: After creation → declared role slots + team-memory repo (agents enrolled at runtime)
newTeamModal.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this squad responsible for…
newTeamModal.errRoleNameRequired: Each role needs a role name.

instantiateModal.title: Instantiate template
instantiateModal.subtitle: Instantiate {{name}} into a team. Project-independent — build the team + declare role slots by the mix + seed memory + bind the workflow; Phase-1 does not mint agent identities (enrolled at runtime), and projects are linked later under the detail's “Linked projects”.
instantiateModal.roleMixHint: (carried from the template; count / cli / model / concurrency / tags adjustable)
instantiateModal.agentIdentityValue: Phase-1 not minted · enrolled at runtime
instantiateModal.footnote: ＊ Instantiate only builds the team and role declarations, not agent identities (Phase-1 facade mints 0 agents; members are enrolled at runtime); project-related work (seeding project facts into the team repo, actually running a plan) is deferred to associate_project; workflow binding does not depend on a project.

addMemberModal.errIdentityNotFound: This agent / human no longer exists or was deactivated; please re-select.
addMemberModal.errConflict: This agent is already on another team; please refresh and retry.
addMemberModal.errNotFound: The source info is stale (this member is no longer on the original team); please refresh and retry.
addMemberModal.migrateSubtitle: {{name}} is currently an exclusive member of {{from}}.
addMemberModal.migrateWarning: An agent is exclusive to one team. Joining this team will move it out of {{from}}; its running tasks on the original team must be wrapped up / reassigned first.
addMemberModal.title: Add member
addMemberModal.subtitle: Enroll an agent or human into a declared role.
addMemberModal.emptyAgentBody: Every agent in the org is already on this team, or there are none yet.
addMemberModal.emptyHumanBody: Every human in the org is already on this team, or there are none yet.
addMemberModal.selectAgentHintMigrate: {{name}} is currently on {{from}} — an agent is exclusive to one team; Add pops a migration confirm.
addMemberModal.selectAgentHint: Picking an agent already on another team triggers a migration confirm (an agent is exclusive to one team).
addMemberModal.selectHumanHint: A human may belong to many teams.

extractModal.title: Extract → Template
extractModal.subtitle: Extract a blueprint from {{name}}. Suspected proprietary tokens have been scanned — each must be curated to pass the gate before saving (no bulk select, to prevent leaks).
extractModal.note: Scanned {{count}} suspected proprietary spots. Default actions are pre-selected; please confirm each one. red = remove · green = keep.
extractModal.gateScanningBody: — identifying suspected proprietary tokens, hold on.
extractModal.gateBlockedBody: — still keeping {{count}} high-risk token(s); placehold them first.

roleBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this role responsible for… (written into team-memory)
